name: Jumbles # 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and sugar together until smooth.
2. Add the egg and vanilla, mixing thoroughly.
3. Sift together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, salt, nutmeg, and cinnamon.
4. Gradually add the sifted ingredients to the butter mixture, alternating with sour milk, until well combined.
5. Shape the dough into a soft roll and chill for about 30 minutes.
6. Turn out onto a lightly floured surface and roll to a thickness of 1/2 inch.
7. Cut into desired shapes using a floured cutter.
8. Spread half of the cookies with grape jelly or another preferred filling.
9. Make three small openings in the remaining cookies.
10. Place the filled and unfilled cookies on an oiled baking sheet.
11. Bake at 425°F for 10-12 minutes, or until lightly golden.
24 servings.
